name: marteso
description: Automated ASO optimization engine for Apple App Store using AI

scripts.dev: concurrently "tsx watch src/web/server.ts" "cd web && npx vite" "cd landing && npm run dev" "cd docs-site && npm start -- --port 3030"
scripts.deploy: cd web && npx vite build && cd ../landing && npm run build && cd ../docs && npm run build && cd .. && rsync -az --exclude 'node_modules' --exclude '.env' --exclude 'web/node_modules' --exclude 'web/dist' --exclude 'landing/node_modules' --exclude 'landing/dist' --exclude 'docs/node_modules' --exclude 'docs/build' -e 'ssh -i ~/.ssh/oracle' . ubuntu@144.21.36.217:~/appcore/ && rsync -az -e 'ssh -i ~/.ssh/oracle' web/dist ubuntu@144.21.36.217:~/appcore/web/ && rsync -az -e 'ssh -i ~/.ssh/oracle' landing/dist ubuntu@144.21.36.217:~/appcore/landing/ && rsync -az -e 'ssh -i ~/.ssh/oracle' docs/build ubuntu@144.21.36.217:~/appcore/docs/ && ssh -i ~/.ssh/oracle ubuntu@144.21.36.217 'export PATH=/home/ubuntu/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.22.1/installation/bin:$PATH && cd ~/appcore && npm install && npx prisma generate && NODE_ENV=production pm2 restart appcore --update-env'
scripts.deploy:worker: rsync -az --exclude 'node_modules' --exclude '.env' -e 'ssh -i ~/.ssh/macmini -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ProxyCommand="ssh -i ~/.ssh/oracle -W %h:%p ubuntu@144.21.36.217"' worker/ alexpolan@192.168.1.139:~/appcore-worker/ && ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ProxyCommand='ssh -i ~/.ssh/oracle -W %h:%p ubuntu@144.21.36.217' -i ~/.ssh/macmini alexpolan@192.168.1.139 'export PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH && cd ~/appcore-worker && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && pm2 delete appcore-worker 2>/dev/null; pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs'
